name: Barbecued Pork Ribs with Currant Glaze
recipeIngredient: Pork loin back ribs or Spareribs (3 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all spice ingredients in a bowl.
2. Rub the pork ribs with the spice mixture.
3. Place the ribs on a grill and cook at medium heat for about 30 minutes per side until tender.
4. Remove the ribs from the grill and let them rest for a few minutes before serving.
